text: I'd tell you a joke about procrastination, but I'll get around to it eventually. Maybe tomorrow. Or next week. I've actually had the perfect joke prepared for about three months now, but I keep putting it off because I figure I'll come up with something better later. The thing is, I never do, so I just keep waiting. At this point I'm pretty sure the joke has expired and nobody will laugh anyway, which is actually perfect because it takes all the pressure off.
